description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof and a compact, rectangular layout. The exterior features a combination of white and light gray walls, accented by a brick-patterned perimeter wall that encloses a private patio area. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically along the facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior living spaces. The house includes an outdoor patio with a large umbrella and seating area, visible from multiple angles, and a small garden section. The interior is open-plan, with visible living, dining, and kitchen areas, as well as private rooms and a bathroom. The main entryway is simple, with a single door and no prominent porch or steps.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, brick-patterned perimeter wall, large windows, and a private patio with outdoor seating and umbrella.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, patio with umbrella, and open living area through large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick-patterned wall, asymmetrical window placement, and patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio, garden section, and more of the open-plan interior layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with clear visibility of the main living area, patio, and entry door.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple single door entry with no porch or steps, integrated into the brick-patterned perimeter wall.
